posts.author: Bexmedia_Tom (Tom Zandt-Valentine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please forgive me if i cannot find an existing thread on this.

We are using SOPs in our monday via the workdocs.

In our boards we would like to add these workdocs as a view on how to use the board for example.

The new ‘Doc’ tab is perfect for this, but i makes a new doc. Is there a way we can link to an existing / a widget view for exisitng docs.

The reason this is preferable is I would like to be able to keep a link to the workdoc from other boards and so I would like to view an existing workdocs as a tab in our boards.

What are you trying to achieve

View an existing workdoc as a tab view in a board.
